title: Access the admin dashboard after signing in
description: This test verifies that an admin can sign in and land on the authenticated dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the admin dashboard is displayed

title: Create a tour and see it in the admin list
description: This test verifies that an admin can create a new tour with localized details, save it, and see it appear in the tours list.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to the tours admin section
Start creating a new tour
Fill in the localized tour title fields
Fill in the localized tour description fields
Fill in the tour location fields
Toggle the VIP options for the tour
Save the tour
Verify the new tour appears in the admin tour list

title: Sign in to the admin dashboard
description: This test verifies that an administrator can sign in through the admin login page and reach the protected dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the admin dashboard is displayed

title: Open a featured tour from the homepage
description: This test verifies that a visitor can browse the homepage featured content and open a tour detail page from a featured card.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Verify featured content is displayed
Click a featured tour card
Verify the tour detail page is displayed

title: Create a blog article and see it in the list
description: An admin can create a new blog article with markdown and access settings, save it, and see it appear in the blog list.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/login
Fill in the admin username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the admin password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the blog management section
Start creating a new article
Fill in the article title field with Winter Escape in the Alps
Fill in the article content field with valid markdown content
Select a valid access level
Toggle hidden VIP status if available
Save the article
Verify the new article appears in the blog list
Verify the article is available with the selected access settings

title: Browse featured content from the homepage
description: This test verifies that a public visitor can open the homepage, see featured carousels, and reach a featured item detail page.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll through the featured content carousels
Verify featured content sections are displayed
Open a featured item from a carousel
Verify a detail page for the selected item is displayed

title: Open a featured blog article from the homepage
description: This test verifies that a public visitor can browse the homepage featured content and open a featured blog article detail page.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Verify featured content is displayed
Click a featured blog card
Verify the blog article detail page is displayed

title: View the admin login and reach the dashboard
description: An admin can sign in through the login page and land on the dashboard after submitting valid credentials.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/login
Fill in the admin username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the admin password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the admin dashboard is displayed
Verify the user is authenticated in the admin area

title: Browse public sections with bottom navigation
description: This test verifies that a visitor can use the bottom navigation to move between the public content sections and reach the contacts page.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the navigation link to view tours
Verify the tours listing page is displayed
Click the navigation link to view services
Verify the services listing page is displayed
Click the navigation link to view blog posts
Verify the blog listing page is displayed
Click the navigation link to view contacts
Verify the contacts page is displayed

title: Browse tours and open a tour detail from the list
description: This test verifies that a shopper can view the tour catalog and open a tour card to its detail page.

steps.description: Navigate to /tours
Verify tour cards are displayed
Open a tour card
Verify the selected tour detail page is displayed

title: Create a service and see it in the admin list
description: This test verifies that an admin can create a new service, save it, and see it appear in the admin service list.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the service creation page
Fill in the localized title field with a unique service name
Fill in the localized description field with a service description
Save the service
Verify the new service appears in the admin service list

title: Switch from the homepage to tours and services using bottom navigation
description: This test verifies that a public visitor can use the bottom navigation to move between core public sections and land on the correct pages.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the tours navigation tab

Verify the services listing page is displayed

title: Edit and republish a tour from the admin list
description: This test verifies that an admin can open an existing tour, update its localized content and publish status, save the changes, and see the updated record in the list.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to the tours admin section
Open an existing tour from the list
Update the localized tour fields
Change the tour publish status
Save the tour
Verify the updated tour appears in the admin tour list

title: Delete a tour from the admin list
description: This test verifies that an admin can delete an existing tour and see it removed from the list.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to the tours admin section
Open an existing tour from the list

Verify the tour is removed from the admin tour list

description: An admin can open an existing blog article, modify its markdown content and publish status, save the changes, and see the updated article in the list.

Use the bottom navigation to open the blog section

title: Edit and publish an existing tour
description: This test verifies that an admin can open an existing tour, update its content, publish it, and keep it visible in the tour list.

Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}

Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the two-factor security page
Start two-factor setup
Complete the verification step with a valid one-time code
Verify two-factor security is enabled

title: Find a tour with search and filters
description: This test verifies that a shopper can search and filter tours to narrow results and open a matching tour detail page.

steps.description: Navigate to /tours
Enter a search term that matches an available tour
Select a relevant tour filter

Click a tour result

Submit the login form

Enter a valid 6-digit verification code

Verify two-factor authentication is enabled

Verify the updated account settings are saved

title: Reject invalid admin credentials
description: This test verifies that the login form shows an error when an administrator submits invalid credentials.
